title: Red Enchant Glint
description: This texture pack changes the glint on armor to a beautiful red color
body:
This texture pack add a pretty red glint to enchanted gear! this red glint can help make aponents easier to see in the dark without needing any mods or dependancies!

Please email me here with any issues: wowmoonwow@proton.me
